scripts.glog:
git -c color.ui=always log --pretty=format:'%C(yellow)[*] %h%C(reset) | %C(green)%an%C(reset) | %s' --name-status | awk '/^[AMDCRUTXB]	/ { if ($1=="A") printf "\033[32m%s\033[0m	%s
",$1,$2; else if ($1=="M") printf "\033[33m%s\033[0m	%s
",$1,$2; else if ($1=="D") printf "\033[31m%s\033[0m	%s
",$1,$2; else if ($1=="R") printf "\033[36m%s\033[0m	%s
",$1,$2; else printf "\033[35m%s\033[0m	%s
",$1,$2; next } { print }' | bat --paging=always --plain
